page_metadata.biotools__summary: TaxiBGC (Taxonomy-guided Identification of Biosynthetic Gene Clusters): A computational strategy for identifying experimentally verified Biosynthetic Gene Clusters (BGCs) and inferring their annotated secondary metabolites (SMs) from metagenomic shotgun sequencing data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: TaxiBGC (Taxonomy-guided Identification of Biosynthetic Gene Clusters): A computational strategy for identifying experimentally verified Biosynthetic Gene Clusters (BGCs) and inferring their annotated secondary metabolites (SMs) from metagenomic shotgun sequencing data.
